---
title: "TCBL Models — Interactive Mind Map"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    number-sections: false
    page-layout: custom
    include-after-body: []
---

```{=html}
<style>
  #mindmap-container { 
    width: 100%; 
    height: calc(100vh - 100px);
  }
  /* Fix Chinese text clipping in markmap SVG */
  .markmap-node text, .markmap-foreign text, .markmap foreignObject {
    overflow: visible !important;
  }
  .markmap-node foreignObject div {
    padding-right: 8px !important;
    white-space: nowrap !important;
  }
  .controls {
    padding: 10px 20px;
    background: #f5f5f5;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;
    display: flex;
    gap: 10px;
    align-items: center;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }
  .controls button, .controls .lang-btn {
    padding: 6px 16px;
    border: 1px solid #ccc;
    border-radius: 4px;
    background: white;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-size: 14px;
  }
  .controls button:hover, .controls .lang-btn:hover { background: #e8e8e8; }
  .controls .lang-btn.active { 
    background: #0066cc; 
    color: white; 
    border-color: #0066cc; 
  }
  .back-link { 
    margin-left: auto; 
    color: #0066cc; 
    text-decoration: none; 
  }
  .lang-group {
    display: flex;
    gap: 4px;
    margin-left: 20px;
  }

  /* Dark mode */
  [data-bs-theme="dark"] .controls,
  .quarto-dark .controls {
    background: #2a2a3a;
    border-bottom-color: #444;
    color: #ddd;
  }
  [data-bs-theme="dark"] .controls button,
  [data-bs-theme="dark"] .controls .lang-btn,
  .quarto-dark .controls button,
  .quarto-dark .controls .lang-btn {
    background: #333;
    color: #ddd;
    border-color: #555;
  }
  [data-bs-theme="dark"] .controls button:hover,
  .quarto-dark .controls button:hover { background: #444; }
  [data-bs-theme="dark"] .controls .lang-btn.active,
  .quarto-dark .controls .lang-btn.active {
    background: #0066cc;
    color: white;
    border-color: #0066cc;
  }
  [data-bs-theme="dark"] .back-link,
  .quarto-dark .back-link { color: #8cb4f0; }
  [data-bs-theme="dark"] #mindmap-container,
  .quarto-dark #mindmap-container { background: #1a1a2e; }
  [data-bs-theme="dark"] .controls strong,
  .quarto-dark .controls strong { color: #e0e0e0; }
  [data-bs-theme="dark"] foreignObject div,
  [data-bs-theme="dark"] .markmap-node text,
  [data-bs-theme="dark"] .markmap-foreign div,
  .quarto-dark foreignObject div,
  .quarto-dark .markmap-node text,
  .quarto-dark .markmap-foreign div {
    color: #e0e0e0 !important;
    fill: #e0e0e0 !important;
  }

  /* Mobile */
  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    .controls {
      padding: 8px 12px;
      gap: 6px;
    }
    .controls button, .controls .lang-btn {
      padding: 4px 10px;
      font-size: 12px;
    }
    .lang-group { margin-left: 0; }
    .back-link { margin-left: 0; font-size: 13px; }
    #mindmap-container { height: calc(100vh - 140px); }
    .controls strong { font-size: 14px; }
  }
</style>

<div class="controls">
  <strong id="map-title">TCBL Model Taxonomy</strong>
  <button onclick="mm.fit()">🔄 Fit</button>
  <button onclick="mm.rescale(1.25)">➕ Zoom In</button>
  <button onclick="mm.rescale(0.8)">➖ Zoom Out</button>
  <div class="lang-group">
    <button class="lang-btn active" id="btn-en" onclick="switchLang('en')">English</button>
    <button class="lang-btn" id="btn-zh" onclick="switchLang('zh')">中文</button>
  </div>
  <a href="index.html" class="back-link" id="back-link">← Back to Article</a>
</div>

<svg id="mindmap-container"></svg>

<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/d3@7"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/markmap-view@0.17"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/markmap-lib@0.17"></script>

<script>
const mdEn = `
# TCBL Modeling

## 1. Introduction
### PBWE framework
### Multi-scale TC simulation
### TCBL definition & characteristics
### TCBL modeling overview

## 2. Full-physics Models
### WRF
#### WRF-ARW
#### HWRF
#### HWCM
### Other models (GFS, CM1, etc.)

## 3. Diagnostic Models
### 3.1 Axisymmetric models
- Hybrid (Smith 1968, Kepert 2010b)
- Height-averaged (Smith 2003, Smith & Vogl 2008)
- Nonlinear analytical (Kuo 1982)
- Linear analytical (Meng et al. 1995)
### 3.2 Parametric (I): Empirical methods
#### Gradient profiles
- Axisymmetric: Holland (1980), Willoughby (2006), Emanuel (2004)
- Asymmetric: Xie et al. (2006), Georgiou (1985)
#### TC track models
#### Vertical wind profiles (SWRF)
### 3.3 Parametric (II): Analytical linear
- K01 (Kepert 2001)
- Asymmetric extension (Meng et al. 1995)
### 3.4 Simulation-based (I): 2D-slab
### 3.5 Simulation-based (II): 2D hybrid
### 3.6 Simulation-based (III): **3D nonlinear** ⭐
#### KW01 (Kepert & Wang 2001)
#### Y08, linearization, validation
#### Physics: turbulence, advection, landfall, thermodynamics
#### Comparison & applications

## 4. Data-driven Methods
- Radial profile modification
- Asymmetry introduction
- POD-based models

## 5. NatHaz Investigation
- Model sensitivity analysis
- 692-sortie benchmark dataset
- Hierarchy of linear approximations
- Land-sea roughness contrast

## 6. Concluding Remarks
- 3D nonlinear model → PBWE integration
- Microscale phenomena from TCBL outputs
- Model uncertainty impact on PBWE
- Benchmark dataset expansion
- ML & data-driven approaches
`;

const mdZh = `
# TCBL建模

## 1. 引言
### PBWE框架
### 台风多尺度模拟
### TCBL定义与特征
### TCBL建模概述

## 2. 全物理模型
### WRF
#### WRF-ARW
#### HWRF
#### HWCM
### 其他模型（GFS、CM1等）

## 3. 诊断模型
### 3.1 轴对称模型
- 混合模型（Smith 1968, Kepert 2010b）
- 高度平均（Smith 2003, Smith & Vogl 2008）
- 非线性解析（Kuo 1982）
- 线性解析（Meng et al. 1995）
### 3.2 参数化（I）：经验方法
#### 梯度剖面
- 轴对称：Holland (1980)、Willoughby (2006)、Emanuel (2004)
- 非对称：Xie et al. (2006)、Georgiou (1985)
#### 台风路径模型
#### 垂直风剖面（SWRF）
### 3.3 参数化（II）：解析线性
- K01（Kepert 2001）
- 非对称扩展（Meng et al. 1995）
### 3.4 模拟型（I）：二维平板
### 3.5 模拟型（II）：二维混合
### 3.6 模拟型（III）：**三维非线性** ⭐
#### KW01（Kepert & Wang 2001）
#### Y08、线性化、验证
#### 物理机制：湍流、平流、登陆、热力学
#### 对比与应用

## 4. 数据驱动方法
- 径向剖面修正
- 不对称性引入
- POD模型

## 5. NatHaz系统性研究
- 模型敏感性分析
- 692架次基准数据集
- 线性近似模型层级
- 海陆粗糙度对比效应

## 6. 结论与展望
- 三维非线性模型→PBWE集成
- 基于TCBL输出的微尺度研究
- 模型不确定性对PBWE的影响
- 基准数据集扩展
- 机器学习与数据驱动方法
`;

let currentLang = 'en';
let mm;

function renderMap(md) {
  const svg = document.getElementById('mindmap-container');
  svg.innerHTML = '';
  const { Transformer } = window.markmap;
  const transformer = new Transformer();
  const { root } = transformer.transform(md);
  const { Markmap } = window.markmap;
  mm = Markmap.create('#mindmap-container', {
    autoFit: true,
    duration: 500,
    maxWidth: 0,
    paddingX: 16,
    color: (node) => {
      const depth = node.state?.depth || 0;
      const isDark = document.documentElement.getAttribute('data-bs-theme') === 'dark' || document.body.classList.contains('quarto-dark');
      const colors = isDark
        ? ['#e8e0f0', '#b89edb', '#8cb4f0', '#a0c4ff', '#c9a0f0', '#ddd']
        : ['#1a1a2e', '#2d2d5e', '#4a3a6a', '#6b4c9a', '#555', '#666'];
      return colors[Math.min(depth, colors.length - 1)];
    }
  }, root);
  setTimeout(() => mm.fit(), 300);
}

function switchLang(lang) {
  currentLang = lang;
  document.getElementById('btn-en').classList.toggle('active', lang === 'en');
  document.getElementById('btn-zh').classList.toggle('active', lang === 'zh');
  document.getElementById('map-title').textContent = lang === 'en' ? 'TCBL Model Taxonomy' : 'TCBL模型分类体系';
  const backLink = document.getElementById('back-link');
  if (lang === 'en') {
    backLink.textContent = '← Back to Article';
    backLink.href = 'index.html';
  } else {
    backLink.textContent = '← 返回文章';
    backLink.href = 'index-zh.html';
  }
  renderMap(lang === 'en' ? mdEn : mdZh);
}

renderMap(mdEn);
</script>
```
